title: Establishing a commission on the status of transgender people
summary: For legislation to establish a permanent commission on the status of transgender people to conduct an ongoing study of all matters concerning transgender people. State Administration and Regulatory Oversight.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
